body:
## Review Summary

Good idea to split the release process into structured sub-pages. Two bugs: the README.md index has a `=` instead of `-` on line 7 (broken markdown list), and the post-release checklist title says "Etherx" instead of "Ethrex" (line 1). See inline comments.

comments.body:
Bug: `=` instead of `-` — this line renders as literal text, not a list item.

```suggestion
- [Ethrex Post-Release Checklist](./post-release-checklist.md)
```
